title: I Cut My OpenClaw Costs by 97%
subtitle: Here's How

title: The Problem
content: If you're not careful, running OpenClaw on the API can cost $2,000+ per month. But it doesn't have to.

quote: The best token is the one you never send.
author: Every frugal AI engineer

title: The 5 Levers
bullets: 1. Pick the right model for each task

title: Results
content: Monthly cost went from $2,100 to $63. Same productivity. Better focus. Your mileage may vary — but the principles are universal.
